title: rhododendron arboreum subsp. zeylanicum
intro: Rhododendron arboreum subsp. zeylanicum, also known as Ceylon rhododendron, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the rhododendron family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ceylon rhododendron include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Rhododendron arboreum subsp. zeylanicum are used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
